bead.title: Verify bd/br interchange tests still pass with new collection + attachment model
bead.description: ADR-004's compatibility guard #3 says schema_compat_test.go must keep locking the field names and round-trip behavior against real bd export examples. After C2/C3/C4 changes, ensure exports from beads-archive collection AND attachment-linked events still produce valid bd-format JSONL when streamed via ddx bead export.
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/internal/bead/schema_compat_test.go passes. 2. ddx bead export streams events for archived beads inline (interchange format). 3. Round-trip test: ddx bead export | <bd consumer simulation> succeeds. 4. New test added covering archive+attachment export path.
